article.title: Raghav Thind
article.htmlContent:
Raghav Thind

Raghav Thind is a peer contact in Anushk's college-era network. The available record shows brief, practical conversation and casual updates rather than a sustained thematic relationship.

Observed Interaction

On 2025-02-19, Raghav asked whether Anushk had attended Ting's 9 a.m. lecture and later relayed a rumor that Tanay had gotten into Google, attributing the information to Akshat. The exchange is informal and campus-centered, reflecting the social circulation of class and career news among peers.

On 2025-12-14, Anushk messaged Raghav to say that his flights had been booked.

Role

Raghav appears as a lightweight peer connection in the college network, associated with day-to-day academic chatter, informal updates, and occasional logistics.
